content.problemStatement:
You are given an array A1,A2,…,ANA_1,A_2,…,A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​, consisting of NNN integers.

Let's define a function F(M)F(M)F(M), where M≤NM \leq NM≤N, as an integer denoting the minimum number of the following operations required to make all the values A1,A2,…,AMA_1,A_2,…,A_MA1​,A2​,…,AM​, equal:

Choose a non-empty sequence S=i1,i2,…,i2k+1S = i_1, i_2, …, i_{2k + 1}S=i1​,i2​,…,i2k+1​ such that i1<i2<i3<....<i2k+1i_1 < i_2 < i_3 < .... < i_{2k + 1}i1​<i2​<i3​<....<i2k+1​, and then do **any one** of the following :



Subtract 111 from AijA_{i_j}Aij​​ for all **even** jjj satisfying 1≤j≤2⋅k+11 \le j \le 2 \cdot k + 11≤j≤2⋅k+1, and Add 111 to AijA_{i_j}Aij​​ for all **odd** jjj satisfying 1≤j≤2⋅k+11 \le j \le 2 \cdot k + 11≤j≤2⋅k+1.




Add 111 to AijA_{i_j}Aij​​ for all **even** jjj satisfying 1≤j≤2⋅k+11 \le j \le 2 \cdot k + 11≤j≤2⋅k+1, and Subtract 111 from AijA_{i_j}Aij​​ for all **odd** jjj satisfying 1≤j≤2⋅k+11 \le j \le 2 \cdot k + 11≤j≤2⋅k+1.



Find the sum of F(i)F(i)F(i) over all iii from 111 to NNN.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN — the number of elements of the array.
The next line contains NNN space separated integers A1,A2,...,ANA_1,A_2,...,A_NA1​,A2​,...,AN​, denoting the elements of the array.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the minimum number of operations required to make all the elements in the array equal.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 500050005000.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1:1:1:

F(1)=0F(1) = 0F(1)=0
F(2)=2F(2) = 2F(2)=2, here in one operation we can choose S=1S = 1S=1 and decrease A1A_1A1​ by 111 and in second operation we can choose S=2S = 2S=2 and increase A2A_2A2​ by 111 so that the array will become [3,3][3, 3][3,3].
F(3)=1F(3) = 1F(3)=1, here in one operation we can choose S=1,2,3S = 1, 2, 3S=1,2,3 and decrease A1A_1A1​ and A3A_3A3​ by 111 and increase A2A_2A2​ by 111 so that the array will become [3,3,3][3, 3, 3][3,3,3].
